title: Iran strikes, Lindsey Graham, Apple takes OpenAI to court and more in Morning Squawk
summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.

title: AI is changing older workers' careers, research finds — here's how
summary: AI may either prompt some older workers to leave their jobs or help make their roles more efficient, research finds. Here's which careers may be most affected.

title: Meta's Louisiana data center investment to reach $50 billion, aided by generous tax incentives
summary: Meta said the planned Hyperion data center supercluster in Richland Parish, Louisiana, will be a 5GW facility and cost over $50 billion.

title: Europe's Anduril rival Helsing raises $1.8 billion at $18 billion valuation
summary: Helsing said "investor demand significantly exceeded the available allocation" for its $1.8 billion funding round.

title: TSMC, the world's largest contract chipmaker, reports 68% surge in June revenue
summary: Ahead of its second-quarter earnings, TSMC reported its June and first-half revenue for 2026.
